title: Cancrinia goloskokovii
taxonomy: Cancrinia goloskokovii is a species of plant in the family Crassulaceae. The genus Cancrinia is part of the order Saxifragales. It is a rare succulent native to the Altai Mountains in Russia. Cancrinia goloskokovii is a type of alpine plant that grows in rocky, mountainous areas. Its classification is further divided into the family Crassulaceae, genus Cancrinia, and species C. goloskokovii.
